query:
select 
          product_id, 
          jsonb_agg(
            jsonb_build_object(
              'id', id,
              'product_id', product_id,
              'amount', amount,
              'archived', archived,
              'created_at', created_at,
              'modified_at', modified_at
            )
          ) as "prices: Json<Vec<Price>>"
        from prices
        where product_id = any($1)
        group by product_id
